title: Cat Amulets
description: Adds an amulet which you can give to cats, which will give you an extra heart for every cat with an amulet around you, and also more amulets to extend the powers
body:
# Cat Amulets
Adds a bunch of amulets, which can make cats give you extra hearts. Firstly, you need to get the health amulet, then you can enhance the functionality with range amulet and dimensional link amulet.

You can have up to 10 extra hearts when you have 10 or more cats around you. Crafting recipes can be found below or in the image gallery.

**This datapack used to be called Health Support Cats**

NOTE: Cats do not change visually when they have amulets, sorry :(


<details>

<summary>Health Amulet</summary>
Throw at a cat to equip. Will make it give you an extra heart whenever you are 8 blocks or closer. Stacks with other cats with amulets around, up to ten hearts. Also renames the cat, so use your nametags after you upgrade it. Works even on untamed cats.

---

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ETUoPq8i/images/23c2fe9d468e5c8958cd45f1380b00a82dc8f54b.png)
</details>
<details>

<summary>Range Amulet</summary>
Can be equipped once you give a cat a health amulet. Extends the effect from 8 blocks to 24 blocks.

---

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ETUoPq8i/images/616c27fd106e43ac23722b8143096fdca5b48239.png)
</details>


<details>
<summary>Dimensional Link Amulet</summary>
Can only be applied after using both range and health amulets. Takes away the ability from cats to give hp if their owner is nearby, instead it needs to stand on a charged respawn anchor for it to work. When this is true, the cat gives the hp to the owner regardless of distance, as long as it is in loaded chunks. Slowly depletes charges in anchors, causing them to eventually not work and need to be recharged.

---

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ETUoPq8i/images/6f94cfd4dd39f4f516912f96bdea1ad1fb35ddec.png)


</details>



### Other
If you have any suggestions, or found any bugs, feel free to join my discord server (link in external sources)
